summary: Talent Flow LinkedIn Monitor — field_monitor bridge. Reads field_state title changes on LinkedIn URLs, joins against people.people_master, bridges into MovementEngine as EVENT_TALENTFLOW_MOVE. Kill switches KILL_TALENT_FLOW_MONITOR and KILL_LINKEDIN_SEED enforced. Sample gate LIMIT 100. Seed SQL and parser KV seeder included.

verification.read_only_bridge: linkedin_monitor.py reads field_monitor tables only — never writes
verification.db_agent_status: DB_COMPLETE — seed ran, 0 rows (data-dependent, re-run when people_master has LinkedIn URLs)
